scripts.build: pnpm contracts:build && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/api build && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/pos-verifier build
scripts.test: pnpm contracts:test && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/api test && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/pos-verifier test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @redeemloop/contracts lint && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/api lint && pnpm --filter @redeemloop/pos-verifier lint
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
